script:
async function getBingDict(n,t){n=decodeURIComponent(encodeURIComponent(n));let e=await t.get(`https://www.bing.com/api/v6/dictionarywords/search?q=${n}&appid=371E7B2AF0F9B84EC491D731DF90A55719C7D209&mkt=zh-cn&pname=bingdict`),i=e.data,a=i.value[0].meaningGroups;if(0===a.length)return{};let o="发音, 快速释义, 变形, 例句".trim().split(/,\s*/),s=a.reduce((n,t)=>{let e=n[t.partsOfSpeech?.[0]?.description||t.partsOfSpeech?.[0]?.name];return Array.isArray(e)&&e.push(t),n},o.reduce((n,t)=>(n[t]=[],n),{})),r={pronunciations:[],explanations:[],associations:[],sentence:[],audios:[]};for(let p of s["发音"])r.pronunciations.push({region:p.partsOfSpeech[0].name,symbol:p.meanings[0].richDefinitions[0].fragments[0].text,voice:""});for(let c of s["快速释义"])r.explanations.push({trait:c.partsOfSpeech[0].name,explains:c.meanings[0].richDefinitions[0].fragments.map(n=>n.text)});function l(n){let t;return n.replace(/\{(\d+)#(.*?)\$.*?\}/g,"$2").replace(/\{##\*|\*\$\$\}|\{#\*|\*\$\}/g,"")}for(let u of s["例句"])r.sentence=u.meanings[0].richDefinitions.map(n=>{let t=n.examples.map(n=>l(n));return{translation:t[0],source:t[2]}});if(s["变形"][0])for(let d of s["变形"][0].meanings[0].richDefinitions[0].fragments)r.associations.push(d.text);return i.value[0].pronunciationAudio&&r.audios.push({url:i.value[0].pronunciationAudio.contentUrl}),r}async function getDictText(n,t,e,i,a,o){let s=await getBingDict(n,i);return s.explanations?(window.learnMoreUrl="https://www.bing.com/dict/search?q="+n,`

[${a("Pronunciations")}]

`+s.pronunciations.map(n=>`${n.region?n.region:""} [${n.symbol}]`).join(" ")+s.audios.map(n=>`

`)+`

[${a("Explanations")}]

`+s.explanations.map(n=>`

${n.trait} ${n.explains.join(", ")}

`).join("")+`

[${a("Associations")}]

`+s.associations.map(n=>n).join(", ")+`

[${a("Sentence")}]

    `+s.sentence.map(n=>`
  • ${n.source}${n.translation?" "+n.translation:""}
    • `).join("")+"
"+`

${a("Learn more")}

`):a("Error happened")}window.getDictText=getDictText;
